name: How much does exterior siding replacement cost in San Mateo County?

mainEntity.name: What should homeowners expect to pay for siding replacement in Pacifica, Daly City, San Bruno, Hillsborough, or Half Moon Bay?
mainEntity.text: What should homeowners expect to pay for siding replacement in Pacifica, Daly City, San Bruno, Hillsborough, or Half Moon Bay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Siding replacement pricing in San Mateo County depends on the size and complexity of the home, the chosen material, and how much hidden damage is uncovered after removal. A simple re-side on a small home will cost far less than a project that requires sheathing replacement, new trim, upgraded flashing, and extensive painting. Homes on steep lots, with difficult access, multi-story elevations, or lots of windows also raise labor costs. Coastal homes may need additional moisture protection and corrosion-resistant components, which can add to the budget. The most useful way to compare bids is to look at what is included: demolition, disposal, flashing, trim, caulking, paint, permits, and allowances for repairs. A low bid that excludes these items may end up costing more after change orders.
acceptedAnswer.description: Costs vary widely based on home size, siding material, trim work, access, and hidden damage, but full siding replacement often ranges from moderate to high five figures on a typical home. Coastal homes can cost more if rot repair, flashing upgrades, or permit-related work is needed.
